mapper.sql: s.id, s.schema_group_id, s.name, s.code, s.table_name, s.function_name, s.module_name, s.business_name, s.permission_prefix, s.status, s.create_time, s.update_time, s.create_by, s.update_by, s.remark
mapper.select: SELECT , g.name as group_name FROM dev_schema s LEFT JOIN dev_schema_group g ON s.schema_group_id = g.id WHERE s.status = 0 ORDER BY s.id DESC
SELECT FROM dev_schema s WHERE table_name = #{tableName} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM dev_schema s WHERE schema_group_id = #{schemaGroupId} AND status = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dev_schema (schema_group_id, name, code, table_name, function_name, module_name, business_name, permission_prefix, create_by, remark) VALUES (#{schemaGroupId}, #{name}, #{code}, #{tableName}, #{functionName}, #{moduleName}, #{businessName}, #{permissionPrefix}, #{createBy}, #{remark})
